description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, black headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband features a decorative gold and white graphic on the top, adding a stylish urban flair. The ear cups are circular and padded, designed for comfort during extended use, and are connected by a sturdy, adjustable frame. On the exterior of the ear cups, there are blue circular accents and what appear to be control buttons or decorative elements. A cable extends from one ear cup, indicating a wired connection for audio input. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for personal audio listening in urban environments.
description: A stylish pair of over-ear headphones with a black and gold headband, large cushioned ear cups, and blue accent details. Features a wired connection and urban-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, padded ear cups and the arching headband with visible cushioning.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the gold and white graphic on the headband and blue circular accents on the ear cups.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open space between the ear cups and the headband's inner structure.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the headband, blue accent buttons, and the cable connection.
